name: Mary's Rum Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 cups vanilla wafer cookies, finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and mix in the chipits.
2. Combine the almond paste with the sour cream.
3. Mix all ingredients together except for the chocolate chips.
4. Let the batter cool before rolling into bite-sized balls.
5. Roll each ball in the chocolate chips.
6. Makes 12-15 dozen.
